title: Senior Teacher - Skill India Mission Partners - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Skill India Mission Partners - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Join the Skill India Mission Partners family as a Senior Teacher in Bengaluru. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Skill India Mission Partners:
Skill India Mission Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Skill India Mission Partners!
